# contrib

```go
import "go.opentelemetry.io/contrib"
```

Package contrib is a collection of extensions for the opentelemetry\-go project. It provides 3rd party resource detectors, propagators, samplers, bridges, and instrumentation as submodules.

Package contrib contains common values used across all instrumentation, exporter, and detector contributions.
